motion_system: Slow wind drift moves haze, hanging fibers, and small offering edges around an otherwise still central stele.
color_drift: Charcoal and deep blue-black dominate, with muted olive, pine, and tarnished straw surfacing in worn bands and edges.
glow_behavior: Glow is minimal and indirect, limited to soft edge lift on pale borders and a dim atmospheric bloom near the focal inset.
